headline: Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
description: IaC manages infrastructure through machine-readable definition files rather than manual configuration. Tools: Terraform (HCL, multi-cloud), Pulumi (general-purpose languages), CloudFormation (AWS-native), Ansible (configuration management). Version-controlled infrastructure enables reproducibility, code review, and automated testing.

citation.name: Infrastructure as Code: Dynamic Systems for the Cloud Age (3rd Edition, 2025)
citation.author: Morris K.

citation.name: IaC and GitOps: State of Practice 2025
citation.author: multiple
